src: A brown teddy bear with soft plush fur, left hand up, right hand on the leg. It has creamy round paws, a stitched smile, a blue ice pack on its head, and a patch on its chest reading "Get Well".
edit: A futuristic teddy bear with shiny fur. The left hand glows with cosmic energy, the right hand rests on a metallic leg. It has holographic ice pack on its head and a chest patch showing "Get Well" in neon script.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The object is on a large textured rock outdoors, surrounded by green foliage and a paved pathway, with another big rock in the back on the left, captured from a right side angle.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object is on a smooth concrete surface beside a gently flowing river, with a grassy backdrop, viewed from a lower angle, highlighting the rippling water and scattered green leaves.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The object sits on an asphalt road with worn markings, viewed from the front and slightly left. The road stretches behind with faint tire imprints and a slope to the right.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object rests on vibrant green park grass, rotated slightly to the left, surrounded by lush grass blades with no obstruction.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object is against a brick wall on a concrete sidewalk, viewed straight on at eye level. The wall emphasizes the texture of the bricks and the smoothness of the concrete. A dry leaf is noticeable to the side.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object is on an enormous, textured rock in an alien outdoor setting, encircled by neon green flora and a glowing pathway. A massive rock is in the background on the left, with stars and galaxies enhancing the surreal extraterrestrial ambiance, viewed from the right.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object rests on a sleek metal floor of a futuristic starship in space, next to a silver river resembling intergalactic highways. Neon green alien foliage in the backdrop, viewed from an angle accentuating luminescent waves, with scattered alien leaves.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: A sleek inter-galactic cruiser hovers above a shimmering metallic path with glowing markers. Viewed from the front, subtly angled left, with the road curving right. Vibrant starfields and celestial bodies enhance the futuristic aura.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: An object rests on a glowing, iridescent surface of alien terrain, surrounded by bioluminescent grass-like tendrils. The scene is slightly rotated left, with green hues and alien colors, illuminated by celestial bodies, creating an inter-galactic botanical wonderland.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The object is set against shimmering metallic bricks with an iridescent glow. The sidewalk beneath is a smooth silver surface. A cosmic leaf drifts to the side, creating an inter-galactic atmosphere.
